text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, February 01. No work meetings today. You have neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place and FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that setting my fantasy football lineup. It was a really interesting history episode. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good way to wrap up the day. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Busy day for sports! Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Bedtime can be a challenge. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Planning a street block party soon. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've noted the plans. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Researching rover power systems in depth. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: I checked the telemetry feeds. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that checking on some house maintenance items. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. I can help troubleshoot that. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Sarah found a new recipe to try. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Yum, that sounds delicious! Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Setting my fantasy football lineup. It was a really interesting history episode. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Relaxation mode active. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. That's a big step. That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! That sounds like a sweet moment. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Planning a street block party soon. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Social breaks are great. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reading scientific papers late tonight. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. Space science and tech is a great focus. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: The kitchen sink area has a problem. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Home maintenance is a constant cycle. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that putting together our grocery list. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Healthy choices are great. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
